json.title: Industrial Postgraduate Programme (IPP)
json.description: Job Description: We are seeking highly motivated individuals to join the Industrial Postgraduate Programme (IPP), a collaborative initiative between academia and industry. As an IPP candidate, you will pursue a PhD/Master degree while conducting applied research on a project co-developed with a sponsoring company and university. You will be jointly supervised by academic and industry mentors, and are expected to contribute to impactful solutions that address real-world challenges. Responsibilities: Conduct in-depth research aligned with the company’s business and technological needs Collaborate closely with both academic and industry supervisors throughout the research Spend at least 50% of research time at the company’s premises Prepare and publish academic papers or technical reports where applicable Participate in regular reviews, seminars, and research milestone assessments Present findings to both academic and industry stakeholders Requirements: Must be a Singapore Citizen or Singapore Permanent Resident (SPR) Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in engineering, computing, science, or a related field Strong academic background and interest in applied research Full-time commitment for the duration of the program Alignment with the project’s research focus area Meet university admission requirements for postgraduate research degrees Strong problem-solving, analytical, and critical thinking skills Self-driven and capable of working independently and in cross-functional teams
json.company_description:
Sea is a global technology company in Southeast Asia, Taiwan, and Brazil. Our mission is to better the lives of the consumers and small businesses of our region with technology.

Our businesses include:

Shopee, the largest pan-regional e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Taiwan, and a leading platform in Brazil. Launched in 2015, Shopee was designed to be mobile-first and highly social, offering buyers and sellers a trusted and enjoyable shopping experience. In 2024, Shopee recorded close to 11 billion orders, and a GMV of over $100 billion.

Garena, a global leading online games developer and publisher with a global footprint across more than 160 markets. Free Fire, Garena’s self-developed mobile battle royale title, is the most downloaded mobile game in its genre for six consecutive years, and was also the world’s most downloaded mobile game in 2019, 2021, and again in 2023 and 2024. Garena exclusively licenses and publishes hit titles from global partners - such as Arena of Valor, Call of Duty: Mobile, and EA Sports FC Online - in selected markets globally. Garena is also a leading esports organiser and hosts some of the world’s biggest esports events.

Monee, a leading digital payments and financial services provider in Southeast Asia. Monee’s offerings include mobile wallet services, payment processing, credit, banking, and related digital financial services and products. These services and products are offered under ShopeePay, SPayLater, and other brands in the region.

Sea is a Singapore company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ‘SE’. Our IPO in October 2017 was the largest US public listing by a Southeast Asian technology company at the time.

company_locations_full.location_address: 1 Fusionopolis Pl 17-10; Singapore, Central Singapore, Singapore

json.title: Facility Engineer
json.description: Job Description: Plan and perform maintenance works to ensure office facilities are in good working conditions, including meeting rooms, workstations, lighting, air conditioning, sanitary ware, fire protection, security systems, etc Coordinate with building management for building related maintenance works and services Assist in procurement of office equipment and supplies Assist in space planning, office moves and ad-hoc projects/events when required Requirements: Diploma or equivalent in engineering, facility management or related fields Minimum 1 year of experience in office management, property management or related industries Service-oriented, good communication, fast learner

json.title: Product Management (S&R&A&C - Regional Trust & Safety) - Sea Labs
json.description: About the Team: Sea Labs is at the core of the Sea platform development, supporting diverse business lines from e-commerce, supply chain, games, payment, and finance, among many others. The strong growth and unique positioning of Sea's e-commerce business, Shopee, spurred the launch of Sea Labs Indonesia. Since its inception, passionate engineers have charted the course to drive the best experience for our users in Indonesia, many of which solutions are even adapted to other regional markets. Sea's hyper-growing business scale has transformed most "innocent" problems into huge technical challenges, and there is no better place to experience world-class projects first-hand if you love technologies as much as we do. Together with our passionate and driven teams, you'll get to develop your skills, build on industry knowledge, and collaborate with global teams in a dynamic space. Browse our Sea Labs Indonesia team openings to see how you can make an impact with us. At Shopee Search & Recommendation, we connect users to what they may want at scale. As a pillar of e-commerce discovery experience, every day, our products enable tens of millions of users to discover relevant and interesting things among hundreds of millions of products and contents available on Shopee. We’re a passionate, young, and diverse team, committed to creating a convenient, delightful, and intelligent discovery experience for our users. We are looking for an (experienced) product manager to join us. You will be working closely with the product team to make significant impacts on Shopee's search & recommendation engine through both technical and operational processes. Job Description: Coordinate with regional and local stakeholders to manage overall content moderation, content understanding and fraud prevention strategies. Understanding business, policy, and operations’ needs and pain points to build product solutions. Align with the stakeholders on the product prioritisation, timeline, and progress. Independent PRD design and project management to ensure the feature is developed according to the requirements. Coordinate with QA on the User Acceptance Testing (UAT). Provide insights on local market’s contexts, competitors, trends, and performance. Requirements: Bachelor’s degree from a reputable University majoring in Computer Science or related fields. Have 1-3 years of working experience as product management; preferably in e-commerce / content platforms with content moderation, risk, or fraud background. Proficient in Ms. Excel, Figma, Powerpoint; Google Sheets, Slides. Good communication and proficiency in Bahasa Indonesia & English, both verbal and written. Will be nice if can speak Chinese. Strong ownership, able to proactively drive initiatives from ideation to execution. Strong stakeholder management skills, able to effectively align and manage expectations across diverse stakeholders.

json.title: Senior Back End Engineer (Enterprise Efficiency) - Sea Labs
json.description: About the Team: About Sea Labs Indonesia Sea Labs is at the core of the Sea platforms development, supporting diverse business lines from e-commerce, supply chain, games, payment, and finance, among many others. The strong growth and unique positioning of Sea's e-commerce business, Shopee, spurred the launch of Sea Labs Indonesia. Since its inception, the group of passionate engineers has charted the course to drive the best experience for our users in Indonesia, many of which solutions are even adapted to other markets in the region. Sea's hyper-growing business scale has transformed most "innocent" problems into huge technical challenges, and there is no better place to experience world-class projects first-hand if you love technologies as much as we do. Together with our passionate and driven teams, you'll get to develop your skills, build on industry knowledge, and collaborate with global teams in a dynamic space. Browse our Sea Labs Indonesia team openings to see how you can make an impact with us. About Team The Enterprise Efficiency team is dedicated to transforming workplace productivity through seamless integration of enterprise communication, open platform capabilities, and management systems covering HR, finance, and operational tools. Our products power the daily workflows of thousands of employees across Sea group companies. Our product lines include SeaTalk (enterprise communication and collaboration platform) and PFMS (people and financial management system). We are currently driving enterprise initiatives where we actively leverage AI-powered tools and LLM integrations to enhance product capabilities and accelerate engineering workflows. Job Description: Design and implement reliable, performant, and scalable backend systems. Write high-quality, clean, and maintainable code using engineering best practices. Collaborate with product managers, frontend engineers, and QA teams across the full development lifecycle. Lead technical design discussions and produce thorough technical design documents. Conduct constructive code reviews that improve team-wide code quality. Integrate AI/LLM capabilities into backend services where applicable, including prompt engineering, API integration, and output handling. Mentor junior and mid-level engineers through code reviews, pair programming, and knowledge sharing. Proactively identify technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and reliability issues – then drive solutions. Communicate technical constraints and trade-offs clearly to non-technical stakeholders. Requirements: 5+ years of backend development experience (Java, Go, or Python preferred) Strong understanding of distributed systems, microservices architecture, and API design Proven ability to produce well-structured, maintainable, and testable code with minimal defects Experience with relational databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL) and caching layers (Redis) Solid understanding of CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and deployment best practices Able to perform thorough, constructive code reviews that improve team code quality Proficient in using AI-assisted development tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Claude) to accelerate coding, debugging, testing, and documentation workflows General AI literacy – understands core AI/LLM concepts and can evaluate where AI capabilities can be practically applied to improve product features or engineering processes Experience with message queues (Kafka, RabbitMQ) and event-driven architecture Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP) Hands-on experience integrating AI/LLM APIs into backend services (e.g., prompt engineering, API integration, output parsing) Nice-to-Have Technical Skills Experience building enterprise B2B or internal tooling products (e.g., ERP, communication platforms) Performance tuning and optimization experience at scale

json.title: IT Helpdesk Engineer, Corporate IT
json.description: Corporate IT is the backbone of our business. Our team helps the company to develop a competitive advantage through defining our technology objectives, assessing solution options, and devising technical solutions that help us achieve both strategic goals and meet operational requirements. As a part of our team, you’ll help deliver seamless IT experiences and support to our internal employees by providing responsive helpdesk service, stable networks and reliable IT systems. As a Helpdesk Engineer, you will be responsible for implementing IT operations according to policy, interpret IT related issues on both System and User side to meet corporate requirements, and provide technical support in a fast-paced and demanding environment. Job Description: Provide day-to-day technical support to end users and ensure the smooth running of computers, network devices and printers Troubleshoot and resolve end user application issues, maintain and update technical support documentation Handle asset management, maintain inventory and liaise with vendors Maintain and monitor office network infrastructure, IT security and antivirus tools Other duties include performing first level troubleshooting and support for scheduled server backups, system monitoring and reports Job Requirements: Diploma or degree in Computer Sciences, Information Technology or a related field preferred Minimum 3 years of relevant experience operating in a similar role In-depth knowledge of computer hardware, software, and OS (Windows and macOS) Understanding of TCP/IP, IP addressing and LAN technology including switching and routing fundamentals Hands-on experience in Windows server administration and basic knowledge in Linux server administration is a plus Professional Qualification - Microsoft Certified/CCNA is a plus Knowledge of basic setup and configuration of Cisco devices such as firewall, switch, IP phones, wireless controller and access points is a plus Competent at documenting standard operating procedures and knowledge articles Ability to cover after-office hours and weekend support if there are any infrastructure issues or activities Enthusiastic and willing to learn in a fluid and fast-paced environment Passionate in IT technology and wants to make a difference with technology solutions Good interpersonal and communication skills to interact effectively at all levels Strong analytical and troubleshooting skills

Assist with mail sorting and deliveries. Manage inventory of office supplies. Undertake any other duties as assigned. Requirements Degree or Diploma holder is preferred. Responsible, helpful, friendly, and cheerful Enjoy interacting with people and being in a front-line role. json.title: Research Intern
json.description: About the Team: Sea group is seeking research interns to join Sea AI Lab (SAIL). SAIL focuses on fundamental research and application research on Artificial Intelligence (AI), which include deep learning, reinforcement learning, computer vision, natural language processing, etc. Our research interns have an opportunity to make core algorithmic advances and apply their ideas at the core research projects at SAIL. This internship has a minimum 6-month duration. The ideal candidate should have an enthusiasm in advancing the understanding of intelligence and a passion for ambitious breakthroughs in AI. To learn more about our research and our lab, please visit https://sail.sea.com/ Job Description: Conduct fundamental research on artificial intelligence problems, including but not limited to the understanding of (labelled and/or unlabelled) data from multiple modalities (image, video, text, audio, bio-data, etc); decision making in a complex and realistic environment; neuroscience-inspired AI; trustworthy AI and theoretical foundations; Collaborate on large projects that are strategically prioritized by the SAIL. Requirements: Currently has, or is in the process of obtaining, a PhD degree in computer science or related field. Must obtain work authorization in country of employment at the time of hire and maintain ongoing work authorization during employment. Publications or experience in machine learning, AI, computer vision, optimization or data sciences. Experience in utilizing theoretical and empirical approaches to solve problems. Ability to communicate complex research in a clear, precise, and actionable manner. Experiment building systems based on deep learning methods. Knowledge in one of the differentiable programming frameworks, e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX.

json.title: Labs Bootcamp Program
json.description: About the Team: Sea Labs Indonesia is the tech force behind Sea Group. We are here to make a real impact for millions of users in Indonesia through the transformative power of technology. We solve real-life problems to create a good user experience through various business operations, mainly Shopee and Monee. Job Description: In Sea Labs Indonesia we aim to develop Digital Talents in and for Indonesia. As part of our commitment, we are opening a Labs Bootcamp program for young talents with a passion for software engineering. Through this bootcamp, individuals will get exposure on working in a global organisation, as well as obtain knowledge and training to flourish the role in one of tracks as Software Engineer. The Labs Bootcamp is a twenty-week program that covers software engineering, quality assurance, and site reliability engineer fundamentals, best coding practices on common tech stacks and tools used in the enterprise development center, and near-the-job training through simulated projects by the end of the program. Only candidates who pass the technical test and interview will be enrolled in the program. Exceptional performance during the program will have the opportunity to enroll in the selection process to become a permanent employee and build a career in Sea Labs Indonesia. Batch 9 Starting Date: 13 July 2026 Requirements: Final year student or Bachelor’s Degree from any majors Passionate and interested in pursuing a career in software development and programming Have a good logical thinking and reasoning ability Willing to be located in Jakarta and participate in the Bootcamp Program offline (Monday to Friday) Note: This program is free of charge and each participant will get a monthly allowance throughout the training period. A full commitment in attending the full-day class is mandatory.

json.title: Assistant Manager Manager - People Strategy
json.description: About the Team: You will be working in the People Strategy team to review, analyse, and enhance core talent management practices within Sea and its subsidiaries. Sea is the largest tech company in South East Asia with exciting opportunities. You will be working closely with senior management in a fast-paced, globalized, and intellectually stimulating environment. Job Description: Work with senior management in reviewing and enhancing People practices, engagement, acquisition, development, retention, and beyond. Lead the development and implementation of key People related initiatives across Sea and its subsidiaries. Review people analytics and derive insights to support core People related decisions. Identify and analyse industry trends, best practices, and case studies for People related functions. Requirements: Bachelor’s or above educational attainment Interest or knowledge in People related topics, e.g., psychology, behavioural science, organisation development, a plus. Self-motivated, adaptable, and versatile learner with the ability to thrive in a dynamic and globalized environment. Strong critical thinking, problem-solving, decision-making, and communication skills (both written and verbal). Ability to collaborate with regional stakeholders in China and in Southeast Asia Ability to effectively balance multiple simultaneous projects and priorities with tight timelines.
